Updated April 2026 · Bangladesh 🇧🇩

Now

What I'm currently focused on: research, learning, and reading. Updated monthly. Inspired by Derek Sivers' /now movement. + Inspired by Derek Sivers' /now movement.

Research
  • →Building 2D thermal simulation model for PCM textile layers (Pillar 1, Phase 1)
  • →Labeling fabric defect dataset in Roboflow — targeting 500 annotated images (Pillar 2)
  • →Evaluating multilingual embedding models for materials science retrieval (Pillar 3)
Learning
🇩🇪 German

Month 1 of B1 track. Nicos Weg + Anki Core 2000.

🇯🇵 Japanese

Hiragana complete. Beginning JLPT N5 vocab.

Boxing (Mon), BJJ (Tue), Taekwondo (Wed), Strength (Thu)

📚 Islamic Studies

Rotating — Aqeedah, Fiqh, Hadith, Tafsir

💻 LeetCode

NeetCode 150 — Arrays & Hashing module
